title: phpinfo() Information Disclosure
description: The phpinfo.php file is publicly accessible at http://192.168.0.140/phpinfo.php, exposing detailed server configuration including PHP version (5.2.4-2ubuntu5.10), Apache version (2.2.8), OS details, document root (/var/www/), and all PHP configuration variables. phpMyAdmin is also accessible without authentication.
evidence:
$ curl -s http://192.168.0.140/phpinfo.php | grep key info:

PHP Version 5.2.4-2ubuntu5.10
System: Linux metasploitable 2.6.24-16-server #1 SMP Thu Apr 10 13:58:00 UTC 2008 i686
SERVER_SOFTWARE: Apache/2.2.8 (Ubuntu) DAV/2
DOCUMENT_ROOT: /var/www/

Additional web findings:
- /phpMyAdmin/ directory accessible
- /dav (WebDAV enabled)
- /twiki accessible
- Directory indexing on /doc/, /test/, /icons/
- HTTP TRACE method active (XST risk)
- All security headers missing (X-Frame-Options, CSP, HSTS, etc.)
remediation: Remove phpinfo.php and any test/debug files from production. Disable directory indexing. Add security headers (X-Frame-Options, CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options). Restrict access to phpMyAdmin. Disable HTTP TRACE method. Disable WebDAV if not needed.

suggestions: Add command output demonstrating access or data extraction
